message:
feat: Add agent detection module and extend IdempotentResult

- Add pub mod agent to main.rs for agent detection system
- Add Changed and WouldChange(String) variants to IdempotentResult
- Update Display impl for new IdempotentResult variants
- Add agent submodules: detect.rs, hook.rs, types.rs

The agent detection module enables automatic discovery and
configuration of AI coding agents (Claude Code, Gemini CLI, etc.)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
